title: Cardamine incisa
taxonomy: Cardamine incisa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The genus Cardamine is a group of plants commonly known as bittercress. Cardamine incisa is a type of perennial herb native to East Asia. It is part of the Brassicaceae family, which includes other plants such as broccoli and cabbage. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and genetic relationships with other species in the family.
